description: Turkish operations of DocPlanner Group, offering online appointment booking and practice management for Turkish healthcare providers. Leading platform in Turkey with strong growth.
business_model: B2B - SaaS to healthcare providers; B2C free booking
target_market: Turkish healthcare market - doctors, clinics, hospitals
competitive_advantage: Market leader in Turkey, backed by global group, localization

varden_fit.rationale: Interesting emerging market - potential expansion region for Varden
